overview: Professional multi-page marketing website for Sri Vayuputra Logistics — a trusted South India logistics company offering transportation, 3PL/4PL operations, warehouse management, and PET trading. Features 12 pages with animated counters, interactive timeline, financial performance dashboard, South India network map, and a contact form with backend storage.
features: Animated counters (9+ years, 20+ clients, ₹9.74 Cr+ turnover)
